response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 10 years of relevant work in diverse industries, including AI-agent infrastructure, enterprise automation, and geospatial platforms. His expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, and backend languages like Java and Kotlin, aligning well with the primary stack. He has leadership in architecture decisions, scalability, and performance optimization, along with strong collaboration skills. While his experience with Nest.js and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, his adaptability to varied tech stacks suggests quick learning ability.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Deep expertise in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization, demonstrated across multiple high-traffic systems
Proven ability to learn and integrate new technologies rapidly, including AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, core technologies in the required stack
Most recent roles are shorter-term (e.g., 1 year at re:cinq, 3 years at Optilyz), which may raise questions about long-term commitment
No clear evidence of direct experience with AI agent development beyond infrastructure work, though this is a desired skill
